case_title: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION VS. EUROMARKET DESIGNS INC

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EROMARKET DESIGNS, INC. Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and for Entry of Consent Judgment as to Defendant Eromarket Designs, Inc. Appearances: William Verick, Esq. Attorney at Law, (707) 268-88900 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, no opposition filed, and settlement complies with Health and Safety Code section 25249.7. Order and Consent Judgment signed in open Court.(302/AJR)Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620
